tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006AddTagsToOnPremisesInstances.addTagsToOnPremisesInstances
tools.description: Adds tags to on-premises instances.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006BatchGetApplicationRevisions.batchGetApplicationRevisions
tools.description: Gets information about one or more application revisions. The maximum number of application revisions that can be returned is 25.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006BatchGetApplications.batchGetApplications
tools.description: Gets information about one or more applications. The maximum number of applications that can be returned is 100.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006BatchGetDeploymentGroups.batchGetDeploymentGroups
tools.description: Gets information about one or more deployment groups.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006BatchGetDeploymentInstances.batchGetDeploymentInstances
tools.description:
This method works, but is deprecated. Use BatchGetDeploymentTargets instead.

Returns an array of one or more instances associated with a deployment. This method works with EC2/On-premises and Lambda compute platforms. The newer BatchGetDeploymentTargets works with all compute platforms. The maximum number of instances that can be returned is 25.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006BatchGetDeployments.batchGetDeployments
tools.description: Gets information about one or more deployments. The maximum number of deployments that can be returned is 25.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006BatchGetDeploymentTargets.batchGetDeploymentTargets
tools.description:
Returns an array of one or more targets associated with a deployment. This method works with all compute types and should be used instead of the deprecated BatchGetDeploymentInstances. The maximum number of targets that can be returned is 25.

The type of targets returned depends on the deployment's compute platform or deployment method:

  • EC2/On-premises: Information about Amazon EC2 instance targets.

  • Lambda: Information about Lambda functions targets.

  • Amazon ECS: Information about Amazon ECS service targets.

  • CloudFormation: Information about targets of blue/green deployments initiated by a CloudFormation stack update.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006BatchGetOnPremisesInstances.batchGetOnPremisesInstances
tools.description: Gets information about one or more on-premises instances. The maximum number of on-premises instances that can be returned is 25.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006ContinueDeployment.continueDeployment
tools.description: For a blue/green deployment, starts the process of rerouting traffic from instances in the original environment to instances in the replacement environment without waiting for a specified wait time to elapse. (Traffic rerouting, which is achieved by registering instances in the replacement environment with the load balancer, can start as soon as all instances have a status of Ready.)

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006CreateApplication.createApplication
tools.description: Creates an application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006CreateDeployment.createDeployment
tools.description: Deploys an application revision through the specified deployment group.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006CreateDeploymentConfig.createDeploymentConfig
tools.description: Creates a deployment configuration.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006CreateDeploymentGroup.createDeploymentGroup
tools.description: Creates a deployment group to which application revisions are deployed.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006DeleteApplication.deleteApplication
tools.description: Deletes an application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006DeleteDeploymentConfig.deleteDeploymentConfig
tools.description:
Deletes a deployment configuration.

A deployment configuration cannot be deleted if it is currently in use. Predefined configurations cannot be deleted.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006DeleteDeploymentGroup.deleteDeploymentGroup
tools.description: Deletes a deployment group.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006DeleteGitHubAccountToken.deleteGitHubAccountToken
tools.description: Deletes a GitHub account connection.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006DeleteResourcesByExternalId.deleteResourcesByExternalId
tools.description: Deletes resources linked to an external ID.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006DeregisterOnPremisesInstance.deregisterOnPremisesInstance
tools.description: Deregisters an on-premises instance.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006GetApplication.getApplication
tools.description: Gets information about an application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006GetApplicationRevision.getApplicationRevision
tools.description: Gets information about an application revision.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006GetDeployment.getDeployment
tools.description:
Gets information about a deployment.

The content property of the appSpecContent object in the returned revision is always null. Use GetApplicationRevision and the sha256 property of the returned appSpecContent object to get the content of the deployment’s AppSpec file.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006GetDeploymentConfig.getDeploymentConfig
tools.description: Gets information about a deployment configuration.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006GetDeploymentGroup.getDeploymentGroup
tools.description: Gets information about a deployment group.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006GetDeploymentInstance.getDeploymentInstance
tools.description: Gets information about an instance as part of a deployment.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006GetDeploymentTarget.getDeploymentTarget
tools.description: Returns information about a deployment target.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006GetOnPremisesInstance.getOnPremisesInstance
tools.description: Gets information about an on-premises instance.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006ListApplicationRevisions.listApplicationRevisions
tools.description: Lists information about revisions for an application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006ListApplications.listApplications
tools.description: Lists the applications registered with the IAM user or Amazon Web Services account.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006ListDeploymentConfigs.listDeploymentConfigs
tools.description: Lists the deployment configurations with the IAM user or Amazon Web Services account.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006ListDeploymentGroups.listDeploymentGroups
tools.description: Lists the deployment groups for an application registered with the IAM user or Amazon Web Services account.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006ListDeploymentInstances.listDeploymentInstances
tools.description:
The newer BatchGetDeploymentTargets should be used instead because it works with all compute types. ListDeploymentInstances throws an exception if it is used with a compute platform other than EC2/On-premises or Lambda.

Lists the instance for a deployment associated with the IAM user or Amazon Web Services account.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006ListDeployments.listDeployments
tools.description: Lists the deployments in a deployment group for an application registered with the IAM user or Amazon Web Services account.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006ListDeploymentTargets.listDeploymentTargets
tools.description: Returns an array of target IDs that are associated a deployment.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006ListGitHubAccountTokenNames.listGitHubAccountTokenNames
tools.description: Lists the names of stored connections to GitHub accounts.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006ListOnPremisesInstances.listOnPremisesInstances
tools.description:
Gets a list of names for one or more on-premises instances.

Unless otherwise specified, both registered and deregistered on-premises instance names are listed. To list only registered or deregistered on-premises instance names, use the registration status parameter.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006ListTagsForResource.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Returns a list of tags for the resource identified by a specified Amazon Resource Name (ARN). Tags are used to organize and categorize your CodeDeploy resources.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006PutLifecycleEventHookExecutionStatus.putLifecycleEventHookExecutionStatus
tools.description: Sets the result of a Lambda validation function. The function validates lifecycle hooks during a deployment that uses the Lambda or Amazon ECS compute platform. For Lambda deployments, the available lifecycle hooks are BeforeAllowTraffic and AfterAllowTraffic. For Amazon ECS deployments, the available lifecycle hooks are BeforeInstall, AfterInstall, AfterAllowTestTraffic, BeforeAllowTraffic, and AfterAllowTraffic. Lambda validation functions return Succeeded or Failed. For more information, see AppSpec 'hooks' Section for an Lambda Deployment and AppSpec 'hooks' Section for an Amazon ECS Deployment.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006RegisterApplicationRevision.registerApplicationRevision
tools.description: Registers with CodeDeploy a revision for the specified application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006RegisterOnPremisesInstance.registerOnPremisesInstance
tools.description:
Registers an on-premises instance.

Only one IAM ARN (an IAM session ARN or IAM user ARN) is supported in the request. You cannot use both.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006RemoveTagsFromOnPremisesInstances.removeTagsFromOnPremisesInstances
tools.description: Removes one or more tags from one or more on-premises instances.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006SkipWaitTimeForInstanceTermination.skipWaitTimeForInstanceTermination
tools.description: In a blue/green deployment, overrides any specified wait time and starts terminating instances immediately after the traffic routing is complete.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006StopDeployment.stopDeployment
tools.description: Attempts to stop an ongoing deployment.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006TagResource.tagResource
tools.description: Associates the list of tags in the input Tags parameter with the resource identified by the ResourceArn input parameter.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006UntagResource.untagResource
tools.description: Disassociates a resource from a list of tags. The resource is identified by the ResourceArn input parameter. The tags are identified by the list of keys in the TagKeys input parameter.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006UpdateApplication.updateApplication
tools.description: Changes the name of an application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetCodeDeploy20141006UpdateDeploymentGroup.updateDeploymentGroup
tools.description: Changes information about a deployment group.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
